description_long: This is a modern, angular range hood with a sleek metallic finish, designed for installation above a cooking area. The main body is a tall, rectangular chimney that extends upward from a wide, flat base, which serves as the canopy for capturing cooking fumes. The front face is smooth and unadorned except for a small, integrated control panel near the lower edge. The sides feature a series of small, rectangular vent openings near the top, likely for air exhaust. The rear face has two horizontal slots, possibly for mounting or additional ventilation. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a uniform metallic color, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens.
description: A tall, metallic range hood with a rectangular chimney and wide base, featuring side vents and a minimalist control panel. Its sleek, modern design is ideal for urban kitchen settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, flat face of the range hood with a small control panel at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the vertical profile and a set of rectangular vent openings near the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two horizontal slots across the chimney section, likely for mounting or ventilation.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible vent openings near the top.
attribute_control_panel_type: Touch panel located at the bottom center of the front face, featuring a small rectangular display and possible touch-sensitive buttons.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are placed near the top on both left and right sides of the chimney, with additional horizontal slots on the rear face.
attribute_filter_design: No visible filter from exterior; likely housed within the base canopy, possibly a mesh or baffle type concealed behind the lower panel.
